inclusions: Lac (shellac); natural gums, resins, gum-resins and oleoresins (e.g., balsams) including Gum Arabic, cannabis resins (heading 13.01)
Vegetable saps and extracts including opium, liquorice extract, extract of hops, extract of ephedra, cannabis extracts, pyrethrum extracts, Japan lacquer (heading 13.02)
Agar-agar and other mucilages and thickeners (whether or not modified) derived from vegetable products, including carrageenan and guar (heading 13.02)

exclusions.condition: Liquorice extract containing more than 10% by weight of sucrose or put up as confectionery
Extracts of coffee, tea or maté
Vegetable saps or extracts constituting alcoholic beverages
Camphor, glycyrrhizin or other products of heading 29.14 or 29.38
Concentrates of poppy straw containing not less than 50% by weight of alkaloids
Medicaments of heading 30.03 or 30.04 or blood-grouping reagents
Essential oils, concretes, absolutes, resinoids, extracted oleoresins, aqueous distillates or solutions of essential oils, or odoriferous preparations for beverage manufacture
Natural rubber, balata, gutta-percha, guayule, chicle or similar natural RUBBER gums (Note: Gum Arabic and natural vegetable gums belong to Chapter 13, NOT 40.01)
